channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Israel and Hamas complete their latest exchange as ceasefire's first phase has just 2 weeks left
item.description: KHAN YOUNIS, Gaza Strip (AP) — Israel and Hamas completed the sixth exchange of hostages and Palestinian prisoners on Saturday with just over two weeks remaining in their fragile Gaza ceasefire's initial phase, and U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio landed in Israel to begin a Mideast tour.
item.dc:creator: MOHAMMAD JAHJOUH, MELANIE LIDMAN and JALAL BWAITEL, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Back-to-back earthquakes jolt Los Angeles area within hours
item.description: An earthquake with a preliminary magnitude of 3.5 rattled the L.A. metropolitan area early Saturday just hours after a 3.8-magnitude quake shook the Malibu area shortly before midnight Friday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, Fox 5

item.title: Eastern U.S. braces for flooding while fire-damaged California city now faces mudslides
item.description: SIERRA MADRE, Calif. (AP) — Much of the Eastern U.S. braced for a renewed round of harsh, soggy weather on Saturday, with thunderstorms and melting snow combining to pound the Ohio and Tennessee valleys. The lower Mississippi valley was facing the threat of strong tornadoes.
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ and EUGENE GARCIA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UFO expert says Trump's declassification could expose possible 'cover-up' spanning decades
item.description: An expert on UFOs breaks down the importance of President Trump declassifying government files he believes holds "the smoking gun" and answers to federal secrets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Black Hawk pilots may have missed air traffic directive, flown on 'bad' altitude data before crash
item.description: It is likely the Black Hawk pilots “stepped on” the communication for less than a second by pressing the microphone key to communicate back to the control tower, she said.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, ABC 4

item.title: Fearful immigrants ask Florida activist to sign guardianship papers for their children
item.description: Since President Donald Trump took office, immigrants in the U.S. illegally have changed their travel patterns and try to stay home, out of fear they could be deported.
item.dc:creator: Gisela Salomon, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Anger, chaos and confusion take hold as federal workers face mass layoffs
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Workers across the country responded with anger and confusion Friday as they grappled with the Trump administration 's aggressive effort to shrink the size of the federal workforce by ordering agencies to lay off probationary employees who have yet to qualify for civil service protec
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN, BRIAN WITTE, MIKE HOUSEHOLDER and MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Dozens of couples get hitched at snowy Colorado ski resort on Valentine's Day
item.description: LOVELAND SKI AREA, Colo. (AP) — There is nothing like dozens of couples saying “I do” simultaneously to warm the crisp, frigid air that grips the Colorado Rockies in the heart of winter.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS PEIPERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Left-hander Cole Ragans and Royals agree to $13.25 million, 3-year contract
item.description: All-Star left-hander Cole Ragans and the Kansas City Royals agreed Friday to a $13.25 million, three-year contract.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: California woman busted with heroin-filled Bibles addressed to prison inmates learns fate
item.description: Heroin hidden in two Bibles found on a California woman were destined to be delivered to two prisons, the Justice Department said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 83 percent say president is required to follow Supreme Court rulings: Survey
item.description: Just over half, 51 percent, of Americans approve of the job the Supreme Court is doing, which is the highest amount of support it’s received in the last three years.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, WGN 9

item.title: Rhode Island pantry that ran out of food gets $15K donation
item.description: A Providence pantry that ran out of food took to social media asking the community for help, and it worked.
item.dc:creator: Leah Crowley, NewsNation

item.title: Abortions to resume in Missouri after a judge blocks restrictions
item.description: COLUMBIA, Mo. (AP) — Abortions are set to resume in Missouri after a judge blocked regulations that had restricted providers even after voters approved enshrining abortion rights into the state’s constitution.
item.dc:creator: SUMMER BALLENTINE and HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Tigers, zebras and other stuffed animals will get new homes after health concerns kept them hidden
item.description: Crocodiles, monkeys, tigers, zebras and dozens of other taxidermy animals will move to new homes after concerns about arsenic exposure forced the closure of the South Dakota museum where they had been displayed for decades.
item.dc:creator: JACK DURA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Idle buses, empty Border Patrol boats: Arrests for illegal crossings fall in the Rio Grande Valley
item.description: MISSION, Texas (AP) — An idled Border Patrol bus sat empty this week, on standby for any migrants surrendering near the southern tip of Texas. Agents in two speedboats zipped past pockets of sandy shores, known landing spots for people entering the U.S.
item.dc:creator: VALERIE GONZALEZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 2 people shot in Philadelphia as city celebrates Eagles victory
item.description: Two people were shot in Philadelphia Friday afternoon as the city held its Eagles Super Bowl Parade, Philadelphia Police said. The shooting happened outside of the parade footprint, police said.
item.dc:creator: Jared Weaver, WFLA, NBC

item.title: House Republicans plot impeachment against judges blocking Trump, DOGE
item.description: A few House Republicans are pledging to bring up impeachment articles against federal judges who have blocked Trump administration actions, including those of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), backing up tech billionaire Elon Musk’s call for a "wave of judicial impeachments.” Rep.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, WGN 9

item.title: Missing man tortured and killed, 5 arrested: NY police
item.description: Five people have been arrested in connection to the death of Sam Nordquist — a Minnesota man who investigators said was tortured and killed.
item.dc:creator: George Gandy, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Volunteers deliver gifts to widows on Valentine's Day. The project began in a florist's driveway
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Jillian Myers knows the devastation of losing a husband and feeling alone and empty, particularly on Valentine's Day.
item.dc:creator: ERIK VERDUZCO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Rhode Island officers involved in shootout sue company for hearing loss
item.description: The lawsuit against the tactical company was filed three years to the day of the dramatic shootout on Denison street in Providence.
item.dc:creator: Tim White, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's framed mug shot hangs outside Oval Office
item.description: A framed image of President Donald Trump's mug shot from when he was indicted in Georgia in 2023 is hanging outside the Oval Office in the latest bit of redecorating since he moved back in.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KRON4

item.title: ICE deports migrant gang member who illegally entered US 10 times and is wanted for murder
item.description: A gang member who entered the U.S. illegally 10 times over the last 23 years and is wanted for murder in Mexico has been deported, Immigration and Customs Enforcement announced on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: White House limits AP access to Oval Office, Air Force One indefinitely
item.description: The White House says it will limit Associated Press journalists' access to the Oval Office and Air Force One, an escalation of a brooding conflict between the Trump administration and the wire service this week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, KRON4

item.title: Fox News embeds with ICE pursuing targets, including illegal migrant wanted for sexual assault conviction
item.description: Immigration and Customs Enforcement's (ICE) Enforcement and Removal Operations in Houston gave Fox News an inside look at day-to-day operations, as officers make detentions and target illegal immigrants.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Virginia murder-suicide victims' bodies shown on Facebook Live: Docs
item.description: Search warrants provided more insight into the deaths of a mother and her three children in Chesapeake in an apparent murder-suicide.
item.dc:creator: Kenzie Finch, NewsNation

item.title: Drone damages outer shell of Ukraine's Chernobyl nuclear plant; Russia denies responsibility
item.description: A drone armed with a warhead hit the outer protective shell of Ukraine's Chernobyl nuclear plant early Friday, damaging the structure and briefly starting a fire.
item.dc:creator: Illia Novikov, KRON4

item.title: Texas death row inmate mouths final 2-word message to victims' families before execution
item.description: A remorseful death row inmate pleaded for forgiveness and mouthed one final message before being put to death in Texas on Thursday, 20 years after he killed his strip club manager and another man.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Denver Public Schools sues DHS over policy allowing ICE in schools
item.description: Denver Public Schools (DPS) sued the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) on Wednesday over its new Trump administration policy allowing Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to conduct raids in schools.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, Fox 5

item.title: Denny's to close dozens more restaurants in 2025
item.description: Denny's was already planning to close dozens of locations this year. Now it's planning to close even more.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Illinois data shows inmates with violent records from shuttered prison sent to medium-security sites
item.description: SPRINGFIELD, Ill. (AP) — Among the approximately 400 inmates transferred when Illinois' decrepit Stateville prison closed over the summer, 278 were convicted of murder and 100 more are serving time for other violent offenses.
item.dc:creator: JOHN O'CONNOR, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Early look: The views and venues of the 2026 Winter Olympics
item.description: The 2026 Winter Games will bring the world's best athletes to Northern Italy, with Milan and Cortina as key host cities, marking the first time in 20 years that the games return to Italy.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Orange, Fox 5

item.title: Eastern storm cuts power to tens of thousands as California braces for flooding
item.description: Storms dumped heavy snow and freezing rain on a swath of the U.S. East from Kentucky to the nation's capital, causing hundreds of traffic accidents, knocking out power in places and threatening to flood waterways as temperatures began rising Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: BEN FINLEY and JOHN RABY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The relationship between the White House and its press corps is time-tested
item.description: This week, the White House barred Associated Press journalists from three media appearances by President Donald Trump — two of them in the Oval Office itself.
item.dc:creator: LAURIE KELLMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds singer R. Kelly's convictions, 30-year prison term
item.description: R. Kelly’s racketeering and sex trafficking convictions, along with a 30-year prison sentence, were upheld Wednesday by a federal appeals court that concluded the singer exploited his fame for over a quarter century to sexually abuse girls and young women.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
